title: Alexandria Real Estate: A High-Quality Bargain For Turbulent Times
text: Alexandria Real Estate just posted strong quarterly results, with impressive lease spreads. It has a strong balance sheet and is well-positioned to participate in the growing healthcare industry.

title: Healthcare REITs: Staffing Shortage Stumble
text: Healthcare REITs have lagged over the past quarter as sharply higher labor costs, a sluggish post-COVID recovery in patient volumes, and the waning of government fiscal support have pressured operators. Hospital operators have been slammed particularly hard as elective surgeries continue to be either delayed or pushed to outpatient facilities, amplifying a broader industry shift towards low-cost healthcare settings.

title: A Bear Market Gift: This Top-Notch Dividend Stock Is Down 38%
text: The company now offers a very attractive dividend yield.

title: Alexandria (ARE) Beats on Q3 FFO & Revenues, Revises View
text: Alexandria Real Estate (ARE) reports better-than-anticipated third-quarter 2022 performance on the back of decent leasing activity and rental rate growth. It also narrows the 2022 FFO outlook.

title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) Beats Q3 FFO and Revenue Estimates
text: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 0.47% and 3.30%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Strike Back at the Bear Market With These 3 High-Yielding Dividend Stocks
text: Take advantage of the market's 2022 decline to boost your dividend income.

title: 3 Reliable Dividend Stocks to Buy and Hold Forever
text: These stocks are built for the long haul, operating in industries with long-term growth opportunities.

title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) Could Be a Great Choice
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) have what it takes?

title: 3 Top Dividend Stocks to Buy in October
text: These three stocks offer alluring yields with steady businesses and strong balance sheets.

title: 11 October Inflation Busting Dividend Dogs Ready To Buy
text: March-April, 2022, UBS, Kiplinger, and Barron's analysts and reporters combined to list five-sets of stocks sorted-as: “Inflation Busters for 2022.” Those five-articles revealed 48 equities, with 43 paying-dividends.
